title: Digital & app banks — payment features vary by plan
intro: Compare iDEAL support, limits, and NL product scope on each provider’s official pages — plans change.

items.reason: Dutch-licensed digital bank — check iDEAL and request payment features for your tier on bunq’s site.
Multi-currency app — validate weekend / plan rules before relying on it for everyday NL rails.
Mobile euro account — confirm current NL availability and payment tooling on N26’s official help.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
